$schema.description: URI pointing to this schema file for editor intellisense.

ignoredDirs.description: Directory names to exclude from scanning (matched by basename only).

maxIssuesPerRule.description: Maximum number of issues reported per rule to avoid noisy output.

failOn.description: Gate level: 'none' never fails, 'error' fails on rule violations with severity=error, 'warning' fails on any violation.

format.description: Output format: human-readable text, SARIF JSON, or both.

sarifPath.description: Relative path from repo root where the SARIF file is written.

rules.description: Per-rule overrides. Keys are rule IDs; values control enabled state and severity.

enabled.description: Set to false to disable this rule entirely.

severity.description: Override the default severity for this rule.

md-img-alt.description: Require alt text on all images.

md-multi-h1.description: Warn when more than one H1 heading appears in a file.

md-heading-skip.description: Warn when heading levels are skipped (e.g. H2 to H4).

md-emoji-heading.description: Warn when emoji characters appear inside headings.

md-link-ambiguous.description: Warn when link text is non-descriptive (e.g. 'click here', 'read more').

md-bare-url.description: Warn when a bare URL appears in prose without a descriptive label.

md-table-desc.description: Warn when a table is not preceded by a description sentence.
